requirements: Build an AI-enabled virtual development team that receives business requirements, produces user stories, generates implementation code, auto-creates tests, executes validation, and reports progress to PM.

user_stories.title: AI Virtual Development Team - Receive Business Requirements
user_stories.goal: Provide clear and concise business requirements to the AI Virtual Development Team
user_stories.benefit: Reduce communication errors and misunderstandings between business and development teams
acceptance_criteria: AI system can accurately interpret and understand business requirements
System can identify key information and extract relevant details from requirements

user_stories.title: AI Virtual Development Team - Generate User Stories
user_stories.goal: Generate user stories based on business requirements
user_stories.benefit: Ensure development team has a clear understanding of user needs and goals
acceptance_criteria: AI system can generate user stories with valid titles, personas, goals, benefits, and acceptance criteria
User stories are traceable to the original business requirement

user_stories.title: AI Virtual Development Team - Generate Implementation Code
user_stories.goal: Generate implementation code based on user stories
user_stories.benefit: Reduce development time and errors by automating code generation
acceptance_criteria: Code is generated based on user stories and acceptance criteria
Code is traceable to the user story and acceptance criteria

user_stories.title: AI Virtual Development Team - Auto-Create Tests
user_stories.goal: Auto-create tests based on user stories and acceptance criteria
user_stories.benefit: Reduce time and effort in test creation and ensure test coverage
acceptance_criteria: Tests are created based on user stories and acceptance criteria
Tests cover all acceptance criteria and have adequate test coverage

user_stories.title: AI Virtual Development Team - Report Progress to PM
user_stories.goal: Receive regular progress reports from the AI Virtual Development Team
user_stories.benefit: Stay informed about project progress and potential risks
acceptance_criteria: Progress reports are generated and sent to the Project Manager on a regular basis
Reports include information on completed user stories, remaining user stories, and unresolved risks

code_artifacts.summary: Provide clear and concise business requirements to the AI Virtual Development Team
Generate user stories based on business requirements
Generate implementation code based on user stories
Auto-create tests based on user stories and acceptance criteria
Receive regular progress reports from the AI Virtual Development Team
